releases.title: Auto-updates & What's New
changes: Automatic updates — the app now checks for new versions on startup and installs updates in the background
New What's New screen displays improvements and new features after each update
Job sheets now save with readable IDs such as JS-01-06-2026-001
Redesigned modals, sidebar, splash screen, and overall interface styling
Added Job Sheet document type for tracking jobs, customers, payment status, and descriptions
Added Time Sheet document type with automatic total hours calculation
Added dedicated Job Sheet save and load system
Job Sheets are stored separately and can be reopened at any time
Time Sheets are stored separately
Improved customer management system with customer editing and deletion
Customer records can now be quickly loaded into documents
Added duplicate-name protection when saving customers
Improved document switching between Invoices, Quotes, Job Sheets, and Time Sheets
Improved PDF generation for all document types
Added custom filenames when exporting PDFs
Improved payment information handling for invoices
Added automatic date population throughout documents
Improved application state management for customer and document data
Improved modal workflows when creating new documents
Improved window controls and application responsiveness
Various bug fixes, stability improvements, and codebase cleanup

releases.title: Initial Release
changes: Initial release of Chris Murphy Work Templates Save as PDF Application
